evals.prompt: Can you check #console-alerts and see if there's anything new we need to look at?
evals.expected_output: Should read recent messages from #console-alerts via Slack MCP, check reactions and threads for status, categorize and prioritize alerts, investigate as needed, check Linear for duplicates, and propose well-formatted issues for user approval

assertions.name: slack-channel-read
assertions.description: Uses Slack MCP tools to read #console-alerts messages

assertions.name: reactions-and-threads-checked
assertions.description: Checks emoji reactions (:eyes:, :white_check_mark:) and reads threads for context/Linear links

assertions.name: categorized-summary
assertions.description: Presents a categorized summary table with severity, count, and status

assertions.name: linear-dedup-check
assertions.description: Searches Linear for existing issues before proposing new ones

assertions.name: structured-issue-proposals
assertions.description: Proposes issues with correct format: Bug template, Bug + source:error-log labels, CON team, Triage status

evals.prompt: hey check console-alerts, we've been getting some sentry alerts firing this morning. anything critical?
evals.expected_output: Should focus on Sentry alerts in #console-alerts, identify critical ones, investigate the affected services, and triage with appropriate urgency

assertions.name: slack-channel-read
assertions.description: Uses Slack MCP tools to read #console-alerts messages

assertions.name: sentry-alerts-identified
assertions.description: Identifies and focuses on Sentry alerts (Critical/Warning, event counts, affected services)

assertions.name: severity-assessment
assertions.description: Assesses severity correctly and prioritizes critical alerts

assertions.name: linear-dedup-check
assertions.description: Searches Linear for existing issues before proposing new ones

assertions.name: structured-issue-proposals
assertions.description: Proposes issues with correct format if new issues are needed

evals.prompt: triage alerts - I think there were some grafana alerts about 5xx errors on the API overnight
evals.expected_output: Should read #console-alerts, focus on Grafana 5xx alerts, use Grafana MCP tools to investigate if needed, check Linear for duplicates, and propose issues

assertions.name: slack-channel-read
assertions.description: Uses Slack MCP tools to read #console-alerts messages

assertions.name: grafana-alerts-identified
assertions.description: Identifies Grafana alerts about 5xx errors and extracts service/label info

assertions.name: investigation-attempted
assertions.description: Attempts to investigate via codebase search or Grafana MCP tools

assertions.name: linear-dedup-check
assertions.description: Searches Linear for existing issues before proposing new ones

assertions.name: triage-summary-table
assertions.description: Presents final triage summary table with actions taken per alert
